name: dfn-gap-analyzer
description: AI-powered manufacturing job routing and analysis for Nigerian factories

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w backend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w frontend && npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w shared
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w shared
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check -w frontend && npm run type-check -w backend && npm run type-check -w shared
